title: Fish-Man Island Draws Near
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Franky, Usopp, Luffy, Zoro. The core story beat is fish-man island draws near.
scene: The scene centers on fish-man island draws near, with Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Franky, Usopp, Luffy, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What use has a dead man for a diamond ring--? In a land so black, he can't see his own regrets

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So, a- huntin'! Go a-huntin'! For the deep, deep treasure proves--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I'll be the richest man this world has ever known

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: B - But that ship is the real thing!!! Take a look at its sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flying Dutchman - A ship that has no place in this world!! Its tale began many centuries ago...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, amidst a mighty storm, a crazed captain suddenly began hurling his crewmembers, one by one, into the raging sea... and when every last one was dead, he spat in the face of God himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: The name of that Captain was Vander Decken!! And his ship, the flying Dutchman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's said that he brought the wrath of God on himself, and was cursed to wander the seas forever while suffering eternal torture!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: And the ship before us right now... is that very accused vessel of Vander Decken!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ankoro... Wadatsumi... If you eat the ship, how can we steal its treasure...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's no good... we're all out of fuel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The kraken?! beast of the north...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've been looking everywhere for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Honestly, what are we going to do with you people?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wandering off on your own like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! Get up, Wadatsumi!! You gotta get 'em back!! Get 'em Good!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So what happened is, me and Sanji's Bubbles went and got broken...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't make us worry like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: wheeew--!! So much space!! It's good to be home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffyyy!! I was so worried... I was so... UWAAAAAAAAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's some will to live you guys have got there!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I still can't believe it... you actually went and tamed that monster octopus...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yep! I'm gonna sail these depths like a pro!! Ain't that right, surume?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There he goes, giving squad names to an octopus!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, I dunno about him pulling the ship... he still looks more likely to crush it...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: This is bad, Cap'n Vander Becken!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't good. These undersea volcanoes...

summary: Fish-Man Island Draws Near. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
